2604.27295.title: Learning Rate Engineering: From Coarse Single Parameter to Layered Evolution
2604.27295.paper_summary: Learning rate scheduling has evolved from the single global fixed rate of early SGD to sophisticated layer-wise adaptive strategies. We systematize this evolution into five generations: (Gen1) global fixed learning rates, (Gen2) global scheduling, (Gen3) parameter-level adaptation, (Gen4) layer-level differentiation, and (Gen5) joint layer-time scheduling. We trace the fundamental motivation behind each transition, showing how the shift from one-size-fits-all to tailoring by layer and time addresses the impossible trinity of transfer learning: lower layers require small updates to preserve general knowledge while higher layers need large updates to adapt to new tasks. Building on this taxonomy, we propose Discriminative Adaptive Layer Scaling (DALS), a unified framework that integrates phase-adaptive cosine scheduling, depth-aware Grokfast gradient filtering, and LARS-style trust ratios into a single coherent optimizer. We benchmark 18 strategies including three DALS variants across all five generations on five datasets: synthetic, CIFAR-10 (from scratch), RTE, TREC-6, and IMDb (fine-tuning). On synthetic, DALS achieves the best accuracy at 98.0%, while DALS-Fast reaches 90% in just 3 epochs. The cross-dataset analysis reveals striking regime-dependent patterns -- no single strategy wins across all regimes. Critically, STLR+Discriminative, the ULMFiT champion, catastrophically fails on from-scratch tasks (43.6% on TREC-6 from scratch vs. 96.8% with RAdam), confirming that directional decay biases are harmful without pretrained features. DALS avoids either extreme, achieving the best synthetic result while maintaining competitive fine-tuning performance.
2604.27295.paper_summary_zh: 學習率調度已從早期SGD的單一全局固定率演變為複雜的層級自適應策略。<lb/>我們將這一演變系統化為五個世代： (Gen1) 全球固定學習率， (Gen2) 全球調度， (Gen3) 參數級別適應， (Gen4) 層級差異化，以及 (Gen5) 聯合層時間調度。<lb/>我們追溯每次轉變背後的基本動機，顯示從一刀切到按層和時間量身定制的轉變如何解決轉移學習的三難困境：較低層需要小的更新以保持一般知識，而較高層則需要大的更新以適應新任務。<lb/>基於這一分類法，我們提出了判別自適應層縮放（DALS），這是一個統一框架，將階段自適應餘弦調度、深度感知Grokfast梯度過濾和LARS風格的信任比率整合為一個一致的優化器。<lb/>我們在五個數據集上基準測試了18種策略，包括三種DALS變體，這五個數據集分別是：合成數據、CIFAR-10（從頭開始）、RTE、TREC-6和IMDb（微調）。<lb/>在合成數據上，DALS達到了98.0%的最佳準確率，而DALS-Fast在僅僅3個時期內達到了90%。<lb/>跨數據集分析揭示了驚人的制度依賴模式——沒有單一策略在所有制度中獲勝。<lb/>關鍵是，STLR+Discriminative，ULMFiT的冠軍，在從頭開始的任務上慘遭失敗（TREC-6從頭開始的準確率為43.6%，而使用RAdam則為96.8%），確認了方向性衰減偏差在沒有預訓練特徵的情況下是有害的。<lb/>DALS避免了任何極端，在保持競爭性微調性能的同時，實現了最佳的合成結果。
2604.27295.author: Ming-Hong Yao et.al.
2604.27295.authors: Ming-Hong Yao, Di Wang, Jian Cui, Jin-Yan Chen, Zi-Hao Cui, Fa Wang, Chen Wei, Qiu-Ye Yu
